languages.text: "Ты повредился в уме, предок? Я устал{mf||а} слушать старческие бредни о былом величии!"
"Have you lost your mind? I am weary of listening to your elderly ravings about glories long past!"
languages.original_text: "Ты повредился в уме, предок? Я устал{mf||а} слушать старческие бредни о былом величии!"

traits.locale_text: "Have you lost your mind, ancestor? I am weary of listening to your senile ravings about glories long past!"
"Have you lost your mind, ancestor? I am weary of listening to your senile ravings about glories long past!"
"Have you lost your mind, ancestor? I am weary of listening to your senile ravings about glories long past!"
"Have you lost your mind? I am weary of listening to your elderly ravings about glories long past!"

languages.text: «¿Es que ha perdido el seso? ¡Me hastían sus desvaríos seniles sobre glorias pasadas!».
languages.original_text: "Have you lost your mind? I am weary of listening to your elderly ravings about glories long past!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Es que ha perdido el seso? ¡Me hastían sus desvaríos seniles sobre glorias pasadas!».

languages.text: “你疯了吗？你那些关于昔日荣光的陈词滥调，我早就听腻了！”
languages.original_text: "Have you lost your mind? I am weary of listening to your elderly ravings about glories long past!"

traits.locale_text: “你疯了吗？你那些关于昔日荣光的陈词滥调，我早就听腻了！”

languages.text: Auriez-vous perdu l'esprit ? Je suis {mf|las|lasse} de vos délires sénescents quant à votre prétendue gloire passée ! »
languages.original_text: "Have you lost your mind? I am weary of listening to your elderly ravings about glories long past!"

traits.locale_text: Auriez-vous perdu l'esprit ? Je suis {mf|las|lasse} de vos délires sénescents quant à votre prétendue gloire passée ! »

languages.text: "Aklını mı kaçırdın? Geçmişteki zaferlerin hakkındaki bu bunakça saçmalıklarını dinlemekten yoruldum!"
languages.original_text: "Have you lost your mind? I am weary of listening to your elderly ravings about glories long past!"

traits.locale_text: "Aklını mı kaçırdın? Geçmişteki zaferlerin hakkındaki bu bunakça saçmalıklarını dinlemekten yoruldum!"

languages.text: 「お頭がおかしくなったのですか。過去の栄光について、お年寄りのごたごたを聞いていると、私は疲れてしまいます！」
languages.original_text: "Have you lost your mind? I am weary of listening to your elderly ravings about glories long past!"

traits.locale_text: 「お頭がおかしくなったのですか。過去の栄光について、お年寄りのごたごたを聞いていると、私は疲れてしまいます！」

languages.text: "Habt Ihr den Verstand verloren? Ich bin es leid, mir Eure senilen Vorträge über längst vergangenen Ruhm anzuhören"
languages.original_text: "Have you lost your mind? I am weary of listening to your elderly ravings about glories long past!"

traits.locale_text: "Habt Ihr den Verstand verloren? Ich bin es leid, mir Eure senilen Vorträge über längst vergangenen Ruhm anzuhören"
